rules: raw_state, rolling features, and confirmed_state use only information formed by the same trade-date close
available_time=15:00:00+08:00 is the research information-set formation time
local calculation after 15:00 does not create look-ahead
calculation and execution at the same 15:00:00 instant are not assumed
R2-T03 does not study after-close execution capability and does not output trading returns
later trading stages must separately freeze calculation latency and execution latency
